mapper.insert: insert into favorite(user_id, post_id, date) values(#{user_id}, #{post_id}, #{date})
mapper.delete: delete from favorite where user_id = #{userId} and post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, post_id, date from favorite where user_id = #{userId} and post_id = #{postId}
select id, user_id, post_id, date from favorite where user_id = #{userId} order by id desc

select p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.image, p.likes, p.comments, p.date, p.user_id, p.user_name, p.status, p.is_top from post p inner join favorite f on p.id = f.post_id where f.user_id = #{userId} order by f.id desc
select count(*) from favorite where user_id = #{userId}
